# Clausewitz

*1780 – 1831 · Prussian*

Prussian officer and theorist of war: his famous formula makes war "the continuation of politics by other means", a rational instrument subordinated to the ends of the state, yet always threatened by its own escalation to extremes.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
